User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user (e.g., cliente_admin, staff, super_admin).

status.description: The status of the user (e.g., active, inactive).

createdAt.description: The date and time when the user was registered.

lastLogin.description: The date and time of the user's last login.

businessId.description: The ID of the business this user belongs to (for 'staff' or 'cliente_admin' roles).

SystemService.title: SystemService
SystemService.description: Represents a system service within the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the system service entity.

name.description: The name of the system service.

status.description: The status of the system service (e.g., active, inactive).

limit.description: The usage limit for the system service.

lastUpdate.description: The date and time when the system service was last updated.

Module.title: Module
Module.description: Represents a functional module within the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the module entity.

description.description: A brief description of the module's functionality.

status.description: The status of the module (e.g., active, inactive).

createdAt.description: The date and time when the module was created.

GlobalConfig.title: GlobalConfig
GlobalConfig.description: Represents the global configuration settings for the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the global config entity.

maintenance.description: Indicates whether the platform is in maintenance mode.

allowUserRegistration.description: Controls if new users can register through the login page.

logoURL.description: The URL of the platform's logo.

theme.description: The theme settings for the platform (e.g., colors, fonts).

supportEmail.description: The email address for platform support.

defaultLimits.description: The default limits for various services and modules.

mainBusinessId.description: The ID of the business to display on the main landing page (root).

Business.title: Business
Business.description: Represents a business using the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the business entity.

logoURL.description: The URL of the business's logo.

googleAnalyticsId.description: The Google Analytics ID for the business.

LandingPage.title: LandingPage
LandingPage.description: Represents a landing page created by a business on the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the landing page entity.

title.description: The title of the landing page.

content.description: The content of the landing page (e.g., HTML, JSON).

seoDescription.description: The SEO description for the landing page.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product listed in the Negocio V03 platform's catalog.

id.description: Unique identifier for the product entity.

stock.description: The stock quantity of the product.

businessId.description: The ID of the business this order belongs to.

customerName.description: Name of the customer who placed the order.

unitPrice.description: Price of a single unit of the product.

subtotal.description: Total price for the ordered quantity (quantity * unitPrice).

paymentMethod.description: Payment method chosen by the customer.

orderDate.description: Date and time when the order was placed.

ContactForm.title: ContactForm
ContactForm.description: Represents a contact form created by a business on the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the contact form entity.

fields.description: The configuration of the contact form fields (e.g., JSON).

email.description: Email address where the form submissions will be sent to.

ContactSubmission.title: ContactSubmission
ContactSubmission.description: Represents a submission received through a contact form on the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the contact submission entity.

sender.description: The name of the sender of the submission.

email.description: The email address of the sender.

message.description: The message content of the submission.

date.description: The date and time when the submission was received.

Integration.title: Integration
Integration.description: Represents an integration with a third-party service in the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the integration entity.

name.description: The name of the integration (e.g., Cloudinary, Google Analytics).

fields.description: The configuration fields for the integration (e.g., API key, secret).

status.description: The status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive).

PaymentSetting.title: PaymentSetting
PaymentSetting.description: Represents the payment settings for a user on the Negocio V03 platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the payment setting entity.

nequiQR.description: The Nequi QR code for payment (URL).

bancolombiaAccount.description: The Bancolombia account number for payment.

bancolombiaQR.description: The Bancolombia QR code for payment (URL).

ChatbotConfig.title: ChatbotConfig
ChatbotConfig.description: Stores the configuration for the WhatsApp Chatbot.

KnowledgeDocument.title: KnowledgeDocument
KnowledgeDocument.description: Represents a document uploaded to the Chatbot's knowledge base.

fileName.description: The original name of the uploaded file.

fileUrl.description: The URL where the document is stored.

fileType.description: The MIME type of the file (e.g., 'application/pdf').

status.description: The processing status of the document.

createdAt.description: The date and time the document was uploaded.

ChatConversation.title: ChatConversation
ChatConversation.description: Represents a single chat session between a user and the chatbot.

userIdentifier.description: Identifier for the end-user (e.g., WhatsApp number).

summary.description: An AI-generated summary of the conversation.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a single message within a chat conversation.

intentDetected.description: The intent recognized by the AI (e.g., 'check_order_status', 'product_inquiry').

SuggestionRule.title: SuggestionRule
SuggestionRule.description: Represents an intelligent suggestion rule for products/services.

triggerItem.description: ID of the product that triggers the rule.

suggestedItem.description: ID of the product to suggest.

Printer.title: Printer
Printer.description: Represents a configured printer for a business.

MenuShare.title: MenuShare
MenuShare.description: Stores the configuration for sharing a business's digital menu.

slug.description: Custom URL slug for the menu.

Backup.title: Backup
Backup.description: Represents a single backup instance of business data.

BackupSchedule.title: BackupSchedule
BackupSchedule.description: Defines a schedule for automatic backups.

AsientoContable.title: AsientoContable
AsientoContable.description: Represents a complete accounting entry (journal voucher).

DetalleAsiento.title: DetalleAsiento
DetalleAsiento.description: Represents a single line item within an accounting entry.

ActivoFijo.title: Activo Fijo
ActivoFijo.description: Represents a fixed asset of the business.

CuentaContable.title: Cuenta Contable
CuentaContable.description: Represents an account in the Chart of Accounts (PUC).

Impuesto.title: Impuesto
Impuesto.description: Defines a tax applicable to the business.

KardexConfig.title: KardexConfig
KardexConfig.description: Stores the Kardex (inventory) configuration for a business.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to ensure Authorization Independence and support the application's QAPs (Queries are not Filters). Authorization Independence is achieved by avoiding `get()` calls in security rules through denormalization.  Specifically, the `LandingPage`, `Product`, `ContactForm`, `ContactSubmission` and `ChatbotConfig` subcollections under `/businesses/{businessId}` include the `businessId` field, which duplicates the parent document's ID, but allows security rules to validate access without requiring a `get()` call to the parent `business` document.

Structural Segregation is applied by separating user-specific data (`/users/{userId}`) from business-related data (`/businesses/{businessId}/...`).  Each collection has a homogeneous security posture. Path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}`) is used for private user data like payment settings.

The membership model is implicitly supported through the businessId on resources linked to each business.

Global roles are managed using content over existence, within the User document under role (e.g., `/users/{uid}` has `role: 'super_admin'`).

QAPs (Rules are not Filters) are supported through structural segregation. Listing operations are secured based on the path and, where applicable, the denormalized `businessId` field in subcollections, allowing secure querying without filtering on insecure data.

Explicit state modeling is used through the `status` field in entities like `User` and `SystemService`.
